prompt: Tap seat S4 to anchor this track decision.
why_v1: Seat anchors keep your track choice tied to the right player.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Seat S4 is the right player anchor, so the cue read stays tied to the exact seat this plan is built around.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Seat S4 is the live player anchor because the mixed-game read changes once the decision is tied to the correct stack and range.
